allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Redesign lead cards - clean, clickable, intuitive

Leads.jsx:
- Entire card now clickable to navigate to Lead Detail
- Clean layout: Name + status badge \(top\), business name, contact info with icons
- Bottom row shows service type, appointment indicator \(green dot\), quote indicator \(blue dot\)
- Consistent status colors across all statuses
- Mobile responsive: full width cards, 44px touch targets
- Quick actions \(Edit, Appt, Quote\) below separator

SalesPipeline.jsx:
- Pipeline cards now clickable to go directly to Lead Detail
- Consistent card design matching Leads page
- Contact icons \(phone, email\) shown as indicators
- Hover effect highlights card border
- Mobile cards show contact info and call button

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:\\JobScout\\job-scout-web" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Migrate 9 sales flow pages to store mutations for offline support \(Phase 4\)

Replace 39 direct Supabase mutation calls with store mutation methods
across all sales flow pages. Creates, updates, and deletes now go through
the sync queue enabling full offline create/edit/sync capability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git -C "C:\\JobScout\\job-scout-web" add src/lib/photoQueue.js src/components/OfflineBanner.jsx src/App.jsx src/pages/NewLightingAudit.jsx src/pages/LightingAuditDetail.jsx)

Bash(git -C "C:\\JobScout\\job-scout-web" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add offline photo queue for Lenard AI analysis \(Phase 5\)

Photos taken offline are saved to IndexedDB. When connectivity returns,
they''re automatically sent to the analyze-fixture edge function and
results auto-update the audit area. Shows amber "Photo saved" indicator
when queued. Also catches network errors during online photo analysis
and falls back to queue.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:\\JobScout\\job-scout-web" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Harden offline data safety: persistent storage, 10 retries, stuck alert

- Request navigator.storage.persist\(\) so browser won''t evict IndexedDB
- Increase sync retry limit from 3 to 10 attempts
- Add red banner warning when changes exhaust all retries
- Data stays in IndexedDB even when retries are exhausted

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
